title: oonopsis puebloensis
intro: Oonopsis puebloensis, also known as the Pueblo or Oonopsis, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oonopsis puebloensis include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Oonopsis puebloensis can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
